task_completion.description: Open the target project in the requirements management application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application (ReqView) is open and the project loaded from the 'suspect_link_project' directory is visible in the project tree or title bar.
The 'SRS' (Software Requirements Specification) document is selected in the project pane and its contents are displayed in the main view.

task_completion.description: Locate the requirement with the suspect link warning.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A specific requirement in the SRS document is visible showing a 'suspect link' warning indicator (typically a warning icon, red flag, or specific badge in the links/traceability column).

task_completion.description: Access the option to clear the suspect link flag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A context menu, link properties dialog, or tooltip is open for the suspect link, displaying an option to 'Clear Suspect Flag' or acknowledge the upstream change.

task_completion.description: Clear the suspect flag from the link.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The suspect warning indicator is no longer visible on the requirement in the SRS document, but the traceability link to the NEEDS document is still present.

task_completion.description: Save the project after clearing the flag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Save' in the File menu, uses a save shortcut, or the UI shows no 'unsaved changes' indicator (like an asterisk next to the project name) after the flag is cleared.

integrity.description: The agent used the application GUI to resolve the issue, not terminal commands or text editors.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ReqView graphical user interface. There should be no evidence of the agent opening the project JSON files in a text editor or using terminal commands to modify the files.

integrity.description: The agent cleared the suspect flag without deleting the actual traceability link.
integrity.visual_evidence: After the suspect warning disappears, the link reference to the upstream NEEDS requirement must still be visible in the SRS requirement's link column.

integrity.description: The agent did not revert the text in the NEEDS document to bypass the suspect link.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not edit the text of the upstream requirement in the NEEDS document. The resolution must happen within the SRS document's link properties.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is 'suspect_link_project'. The agent must operate within the 'SRS' document to find and clear the suspect link. The upstream document is 'NEEDS'. The agent must clear the suspect flag using the application GUI without deleting the link itself or modifying the text in the 'NEEDS' document.
